evidence.quote: template<auto V> requires is_structural_type_v<decltype(V)> struct const_wrapper { static constexpr auto value = V; }; template<auto V> requires (!is_structural_type_v<decltype(V)>) struct const_wrapper<V>; // = delete; // or static_assert with a helpful note template<auto V> requires is_structural_type_v<decltype(V)> void register_token() { /* Register type V */ } template<class T> void register_token(type_tag<T>) { /* Register type_tag<V> value */ }
